title: Premium 4BHK Villa in Kakkanad
description: A stunning modern villa located near Infopark. Features a private garden, modular kitchen, and smart home lighting. Excellent neighborhood.

title: Cozy 2BHK Suburban House
description: Beautiful budget-friendly standalone house in Edappally. Peaceful residential area with easy access to LuLu Mall and Metro Station.

title: Hill View Tea Estate Farmhouse
description: A charming tea-estate farmhouse nestled in the misty hills of Munnar. Enjoy fresh breezes, chilly winters, and panoramic mountain views.

title: Traditional Nalukettu Heritage Home
description: An authentically restored traditional Nalukettu with a central courtyard. Teak wood flooring, antique pillars, and a lush garden.

title: Luxury 3BHK Seaview Apartment
description: Premium high-rise apartment on Marine Drive offering stunning Arabian Sea views. Fully furnished with gym and infinity pool access.

title: Independent Family House
description: A spacious and well-maintained house located in the premium residential hub of Vazhuthacaud. Pet friendly with ample parking.

title: Cozy 1BHK Studio Apartment
description: Neat and cozy unfurnished 1BHK ground floor portion just minutes away from Technopark. Ideal for bachelor IT professionals.

title: Furnished 2BHK Near Lulu Mall
description: Fully furnished with AC, Wi-Fi connectivity, and RO water purifier. Walking distance to Metro station.

title: Scenic 50 Cents Hillside Plot
description: Breathtaking views of lush green valleys. Ideal for a holiday home or eco-resort. Road access available, water connection nearby.

title: Riverside 30 Cents Plot
description: A serene riverfront plot along the Pamba riverbank. Perfect for luxury resort development or a premium private villa.

title: Commercial Plot Highway Frontage
description: Prime commercial land with direct highway frontage on NH-66. Ideal for hotel, petrol bunk, or retail complex. All clearances in place.

title: Premium Agricultural Land
description: Fertile agricultural land with abundant water supply. Currently planted with coconut, arecanut, and rubber trees.
